response:
Emily started with 25 dogs at her rescue center located at [location]. She gained 4 puppies on Thursday and 1 stray dog on Friday, bringing the total to 30 dogs before any adoptions occurred. On Saturday, 2 families adopted 3 dogs each, which means a total of 6 dogs left the facility. This leaves Emily with 24 dogs remaining in her care at the [facility name]. The [contact person] can be reached at [phone number] for further inquiries about the [adoption process].

***

The current population of the rescue center is now stable at 24 dogs after the recent events. Emily needs to update her records in the [database system] to reflect these changes accurately. She plans to schedule a visit from the [veterinarian] to ensure the health of the remaining animals. The [donation link] is available for anyone wishing to support the ongoing operations. Future updates will be posted on the [website address] for the community to review.
